data.title: Faraday Future shows commitment to American manufacturing at Capitol Hill Club, draws over a dozen members of Congress.
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. hosted a successful reception at the Capitol Hill Club, attracting 12+ members of Congress and key stakeholders. The event, held by the California-based company (NASDAQ: FFAI), showcased their commitment to advancing electric mobility. The event focused on highlighting Faraday Future's initiatives in this area.

data.title: Hulk Hogan's villain turn in 1996 shook pro wrestling world, changing his hero image to heel.
data.description: In 1996, wrestler Hulk Hogan, known for his all-American hero image, surprised his fans by going against expectations.

data.title: Amphenol reaches record high, added to IBD 50 list. Stock spotlighted for shining brightly. Check out top-performing stocks.
data.description: Investor's Business Daily has recently updated its top-performing stock lists, including the IBD 50 and Big Cap 20. Notable stocks like Amphenol have been added to the list while others have been removed. Amphenol closed at a record high. data.title: BlackRock's Ethereum ETF hits $10B, becomes third fastest-growing fund in 32-year ETF history.
data.description: The iShares Ethereum Trust by BlackRock has achieved a milestone of $10 billion, making it one of the fastest-growing funds in the ETF industry. This achievement has been reached in a significantly short period, outpacing all but two funds in the industry's 32-year history.

data.title: Buenaventura Announces Second Quarter 2025 Results
data.description: In Lima, Peru, Compañia de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (“Buenaventura” or “the Company”), the country's largest publicly-traded precious metals mining company, has reported its financial results for the second quarter (2Q25) and six-month period ending on June 30, 2025 (6M25). The figures have been presented following IFRS (International Financial Reporting Standards) on a non-GAAP basis and are denominated in U.S. dollars. The company trades under the tickers NYSE: BVN and Lima Stock Exchange: BUE.LM.

data.title: AI Developer ‘Devin’ from Cognition aims for a $10B valuation despite not being mindblowing yet. Investors are eager to support the "autonomous coder."
data.description: Cognition, a company aiming for a remarkable $10 billion valuation, is attracting significant investor interest as they bet on its potential as a groundbreaking technology. The focus is on its "autonomous coder" technology and whether it will be the key to reaching this impressive valuation.
